temporal_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man in a dimly lit, dark environment, likely the interior of a vehicle at night. The man is in sharp focus, while the background is blurred. He has dark hair and a somber, intense expression, with his eyes looking slightly downward. He wears a light-colored, possibly white, hand wrap on his right hand, which he holds up near his face. In the out-of-focus background, another man is visible in profile, also appearing to be in the passenger seat. The lighting is low, casting deep shadows and highlighting the sweat on the main subject's face. In the top left corner of the screen, there is a watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网". The camera remains static, maintaining a tight focus on the man's emotional state. A male narrator speaks in a calm, reflective tone, as if recounting a significant memory. His voice is steady and clear as he begins the story, saying, "然后他就说，阿强，你跟着我五年了..." (And then he said, "Ah Qiang, you've been with me for five years..."). The audio is quiet, with no background music or sound effects, placing all the emphasis on the narrator's voice and the weight of his words.
